note: Reviewed locally with the render-visual-reviewer rubric. This is not an independent subagent review because this turn did not explicitly authorize multi-agent delegation.
findings: The 10-page PDF has no blank-page or stale page-8 blank-column defect.
Figure 1's imagegen v16 method-chain schematic is readable at page scale and remains clearly captioned as a roadmap rather than empirical evidence.
Figure 2 uses real render evidence and does not overlap the caption or Table 2; the top cropped proxy detail is pale, so it remains suitable only as an orientation panel with claims tied to tables.
Tables 3, 4, 5, and 6 remain guarded by the focused layout tests; Table 6 no longer overflows.
Page 8 carries Discussion, Conclusion, and Limitations without stretched paragraph spacing or a blank right column.
Figure 3 is attached to its caption on page 9, uses the InternNav rollout panel, and shows no red material fallback; the visible colored marks are purple/green navigation overlays.
Ethical Considerations and References share page 9 without incoherent overlap.
remaining_boundary: This visual review supports the repository-side candidate packet only.
Final upload remains human-gated by target route lock, OpenReview form copy, runtime/AI/media approvals, and final upload decision.
Figure 2 should not be promoted as a strong qualitative success claim; it remains a reader-orientation panel.
